untranslatable_reason: Linear regression slope calculation is not available in the allowed indicators list. The signal requires computing the slope of a linear regression line over a period, which requires a dedicated linear_regression_slope indicator. The allowed indicators do not include linear regression slope or equivalent trend-strength measures that directly measure the angle/rate of change of a regression line.
translation_notes: Signal KAUFMAN_DRY_6 requires linear regression slope analysis. While similar trend-following effects could be approximated using price comparisons or moving average slopes, the core requirement—measuring the slope angle of a linear regression line—cannot be accurately expressed with the available indicator set. A linear_regression_slope indicator would be needed to properly implement this signal.
